chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 313 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 17.09.2025 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. This reference application has been pending since 2019 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Numerous opportunities provided for compliance including lastly on 06.08.2025, however, the situation remains same and the matter is listed once again for orders as to non-prosecution. Accordingly, reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
